# Savyasachi Jagadeeshan (Savy)

> Personal portfolio for Savyasachi Jagadeeshan - Technical Lead and Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of backend engineering experience. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area.

## About

- Technical Lead at PayPal (Braintree Forward API)
- 8 years building backend systems, APIs, and distributed infrastructure
- Based in the Bay Area

## Sections

- Experience: Work history at PayPal, Stockpile Investments, NortonLifeLock, Qualcomm, and Accenture
- Projects: Open source and side projects including this portfolio site
- Skills: Backend engineering, cloud infrastructure, observability, and tooling
- Education: Academic background
- Beyond: Currently reading (Goodreads), currently listening (Spotify), and personal interests
- Contact: Available via the contact form, GitHub, LinkedIn, or email
